query:
INSERT INTO citizenDelegates (userId, ministryId, delegateId, delegateUserId, votingMethod, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT 
  FLOOR(RAND() * 100) + 1,
  d.ministryId,
  d.id,
  NULL,
  'delegate',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
FROM delegates d
WHERE d.isActive = true AND d.ministryId != (SELECT id FROM ministries WHERE name LIKE '%חינוך%' LIMIT 1)
LIMIT 150
